title: pisum syriacum
intro: Pisum syriacum, also known as Syrian pea or Syrian vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, commonly used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat various gastrointestinal issues, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Pisum syriacum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among others. In herbal preparations, Pisum syriacum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
